title: Come Back When You've Grown Up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, frog. This is your room from now on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This frog is going to be staying in my office for a
short while. The reason being...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All animals of the academy are my potential
familiars! If they get hurt, I need to look after
them!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
However, pets are not allowed in the dorms.
We've been discussing what we should do.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm naming you Slurpy! Since I'll be taking care of
you, you might as well have a name!
choice_data_list: (Well, I guess it's okay for a bit...)
(Well, I guess it's okay for a bit...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I brought you some food, Slurpy! You better eat
every bite, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: C'mon! Look at what a mess you've made!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, nooo! I don't wanna do that! I'm not
in the mood today!
choice_data_list: But I've already put together today's schedule...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Why you... Here's your punishment! Slurpy, spring
into action!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, success! You should've seen the look on
your face, Familiar!
Nice job, Slurpy!

text_block_list.name: Slurpy
text_block_list.text: Ribbit, ribbit. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make you into... such a great fami...liar... Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Slurpy
text_block_list.text: Ribbit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho spends time with the frog whenever
she has the chance. Thanks to that, Slurpy's injury
has been healing quite nicely.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hop, hop, hop!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nice job, Slurpy! You're hopping like a pro!
choice_data_list: You can hardly tell he was ever injured.
You can hardly tell he was ever injured.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That is fantastic. It looks like he can go back to
his friends now!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh...
choice_data_list: I'm sure his family is waiting for him.
I'm sure his family is waiting for him.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: N-no! No way!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Um... I mean... It still looks like his leg is in pain,
don't you think?! He isn't better yet! He can't go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I said no! He can't go until I say so!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ribbit! I found a bunch of worms in the rain!
They're your favorite, right? Here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Ribbit, ribbit, ribbit...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What's that?
choice_data_list: It sounds like frogs croaking outside.
It sounds like frogs croaking outside.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph! Whatever! Anyway, Slurpy, aren't you
hungry? Eat your favorite food!

text_block_list.name: Slurpy
text_block_list.text: Ribbit... Ribbit, ribbit.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait! What are you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're my familiar! There's nothing you need
outside!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It looks like he can go back to his friends now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure his family is waiting for him.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure his family is waiting for him.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Do you want to see your friends and family?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho grabs the cage somewhat roughly
and releases the frog outside right away.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Stupid Slurpy...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Anyone so weak as to sit around missing
their family would never make it as my familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I have no problem living away from my family in a
dorm! 'Cause I'm a grown-up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And then there's Slurpy! Just a little baby that
misses his family!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Come back when you're old enough to be
without Mommy and Daddy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, we hear frogs start croaking outside as
if responding to her.
choice_data_list:
I'll pick up Slurpy's slack and help you out even
more!
Come back when you've got some guts, Slurpy!
Come back when you've got some guts, Slurpy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, we hear frogs start croaking outside as
if responding to her.
choice_data_list:
I'll pick up Slurpy's slack and help you out even
more!
Come back when you've got some guts, Slurpy!
Come back when you've got some guts, Slurpy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... I'm holding you to that! You better work
your butt off!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You need to stay close and set a good example
for the other familiars!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What're you acting all high and mighty for?!
You've got a long way to go yourself!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You better do your best to shape up into a
worthy familiar by the time Slurpy gets back!
